path: Problem: Compute a rolling-period average per entity only when a minimum number of periods exists
Action: COUNTIFS to verify period count within a rolling date window; IF to return fallback text; AVERAGEIFS to calculate conditional average; EDATE to derive rolling window start date

Observation: A rolling window can be expressed as date criteria between [current_period] and EDATE([current_period],-[window_size-1]); COUNTIFS and AVERAGEIFS can share identical criteria to gate the calculation
Problem: Flag whether a computed rolling average exceeds a threshold, while preserving non-applicable states
Action: IF to pass through "n/a" or compare numeric result to a threshold
Observation: When the rolling average formula can return text (e.g., "n/a"), the flagging logic must test for non-numeric output before applying a numeric comparison
Problem: Display whole numbers without trailing .0 while keeping decimals when present
Action: Custom number format to suppress decimals for integers
Observation: Number formatting can change display without changing underlying values; a conditional decimal format shows 0 decimals for integers and 1+ decimals otherwise
Resolution: Apply custom format: [=0]0;0.0 (or use 0.## to show up to 2 decimals without trailing zeros)
